name: Neto by Maropost Release Notes – 9 Dec 2020
body: [{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"OVERVIEW"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Here are the changes coming in v6.132, rolling out this week."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"Minor Changes","bold":true}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"Cleaned up eBay error logs by removing unnecessary debug information."}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"Bug Fixes","bold":true}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"Fixed an issue when adding a sticky note and moving an order to Pick presented a warning saying there were unsaved changes."}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"Fixed an issue where Neto Point-of-Sale was installed by default on new accounts."}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Fixed an issue where MyFastway reference fields were not populating from B@SE tags (e.g., OrderID)."}]}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]}]
